battleTraits.name: Cloaked in Shadow
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly HERO to use this ability. Then, pick a different friendly unit that has 2 or more models to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Make a shadow-travel roll of D6. On a 3+, remove the HERO using this ability from the battlefield and set them up again wholly within 6" of the target. They can be set up in combat with any enemy units that are already in combat.

enhancements.name: Murderous Acrobatics
enhancements.effect: When your general uses the ‘Charge’ ability, they can pass through enemy models.

enhancements.name: Master of Shadows
enhancements.effect: When your general uses the ‘Cloaked in Shadow’ ability, add 1 to the shadow-travel roll.

enhancements.name: Just Another Shadow
enhancements.effect: While your general is wholly within the combat range of a friendly unit that has 3 or more models, your general has WARD (4+).

enhancements.name: Death Screech
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 6" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target's attacks.

regimentAbilities.name: Way of the Skittering Shade
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.

regimentAbilities.name: Way of the Fiendish Claw
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly HERO to be the target.
regimentAbilities.effect: The target has Strike-first for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Go-Go, Hunt Them Down
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly Gutter Runners unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. Then, roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 3+, add 1 to charge rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Shadowy Killers
abilities.effect: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.

abilities.name: Bomb Rats
abilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Charge Phase
abilities.declare: You can only use this ability if this unit has a Bomb Rat token. Pick an enemy unit within 9" of this unit to be the target. Then, roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. On a 1-2, remove this unit’s Bomb Rat token from the battlefield.

abilities.name: Smoke Bombs
abilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: This unit can only use this ability if it is in combat. Roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 4+, this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase.
